coreIssue: This 1:1 with Bill, a Junior Painter and Decorator, is likely focused on navigating the implications of his recent injury on his growth and career development. The conversation should address how his recovery might impact his skills development and identify any specific areas where he can continue to grow despite physical limitations. Additionally, it is important to clarify his role expectations and success criteria, ensuring he has a clear understanding of what is required at his current level. Finally, discussing the support he might need during his recovery will help him feel supported and enable him to progress effectively.
openingQuestion: Bill, given your recent injury, what areas of skills development do you feel you can focus on during your recovery?
listenFor: whether he identifies specific skills to work on
if they express concerns about meeting role expectations
if they need additional support during recovery
avoid: do not assume he can perform all previous tasks immediately
do not overlook his feedback on workload adjustments
goodOutcome: You and Bill will have a clear plan for his skills development and support needs during his recovery.
suggestedAction: Discuss and agree on a realistic skills development plan that accommodates his current physical capabilities.
